node.description: Alicia Rue is the leader of the Cait Sith. She was elected by popular vote. She is also training her dark magic capable of using Moonlight Mirror. She forms an alliance with the Sylphs to finish the Conquer the World Tree Quest.    ~!During the meeting with Sylph , the groups are attacked by Salamanders lead by General Eugene. Kirito dives in to save the day and fights off Eugene although Kirito has inferior equipment.  Later, along with Sylph reinforcements, she aid Kirito's ascension of the World Tree after using collected funds to purchase armor of at least Ancient grade for all of her warriors.!~ (Source: SAO Wiki)

A player with a kite shield and proclaims himself to be a knight. He was the one who organized the first meeting of players to form a raid party to take on the first floor boss. He organized the participating players well into groups according to their specialty and displayed great leadership to motivate and lead the raid party. 

~!He is also a beta tester of Sword Art Online but pretended to be a newbie player to escape the wrath of the players against them.!~

Cobert is a lieutenant-colonel in the Aincrad Liberation Force in Sword Art Online. He has a gung ho attitude. He drives his men to their limits, giving them no rest.   ~!He was killed by The Gleam Eyes after his party entered the boss room without any major preparations.!~ (Source: Sword Art Online Wiki)

A member of the guild «Black Cats of the Full Moon». All the members are actually computer research club members from the same high school in the real world except Kirito. She uses a two-handed long spear and her level is rather low compared to the rest of the guild members. She never intended to leave the Starting City but she did, knowing that she probably would die because she is afraid of monsters. According to Kirito, she and him are a lot alike and are both socially awkward, wall themselves in from people but fear loneliness.

A close friend of Caynz and the one who first screamed when the inside area incident occurred.   

~!She is part of the guild Golden Apple. It got disbanded when their guild leader Griselda died. Shee and her friend Caynz suspected that there was someone from the guild who killed the guild leader for the rare item they picked up earlier. They proceeded to do a plan to scare the culprit into confessing in the makeshift grave of the leader by making it that the guild leader rose from the dead and starts to kill the guild members inside the city.!~
She was one of the 10,000 players who were trapped in Sword Art Online, the leader of the «Golden Apple» guild before its dissolution, and the wife of Grimlock both in-game and in the real world.

A member of the guild Knights of the Blood assigned to protect Asuna.   ~!He was later revealed to be a member of the famous Player Killer guild, Laughing Coffin. He later tried to kill Kirito by setting a trap and killing three of the guild members. He was later stopped by Asuna and killed by Kirito because Asuna can't kill him.!~

He is trapped in the dungeon under the Black Iron Castle by a faction leader named Kibaou. He is later rescued by Kirito and Asuna in during the Morning Dew Girl arc events after he was thrown into a hidden dungeon.  

(Source: SAO Wiki)

A young and cheerful girl with long black hair who looks no older than 10 years old. [Kirito](https://anilist.co/character/36765) and [Asuna](https://anilist.co/character/36828) found her in a forest on the 22nd floor of Aincrad. ~!Her true identity is actually a players' self-regulation program for mental maintenance, Mental Health Counseling Program or MHCP. After being forbidden by the game master [Akihiko Kayaba](https://anilist.co/character/36829) to come close to the players at the beginning of the death game, she was flooded with errors and broke down. In the process she became an AI that possesses actual intelligence. When the Cardinal system governing *Sword Art Online* decided to erase her, Kirito turned her into a tear shaped crystal pendant. He actually converted her to a part of environmental data for the client program and was saved to his NerveGear's local memory.!~  ~!In *ALfheim Online*, she was able to return to her normal form because ALO was based on a copy of the SAO server. She supports Kirito there as a Navigation Pixie. Kirito and Asuna still treat her as their daughter.!~
Johnny Black was a survivor of Sword Art Online, he's a member of the infamous red guild Laughing Coffin and is partnered with Xaxa. He is well known for using poisons and such in battles.
Schmitt is a lancer of the Divine Dragon Alliance and a former member of the Golden Apple.

Leader and founder of the red guild "Laughing Coffin", known for his large knife and catch phrase "It's show time."  His guild was later destroyed by other players in SAO, but his whereabouts are missing. He is presumed to be alive because he wasn't listed as one of the dead players.  

(Source: SAO Wiki)

Sasamaru was the member of the «Black Cats of the Full Moon», a small guild in «Sword Art Online». He was killed along with most of his guild when a trap was triggered that called multiple monsters and prevented the use of crystals.

(Source: SAO Wiki)

Nishida is one of the oldest players in Sword Art Online. In the game, he is a fisherman, but in reality, he works for the Tohto Broadband Connection, a network operator company that runs SAO. He was in charge of maintaining the network connection before being trapped in the game.   (Source: SAO Wiki)

He is Lyfa's friend and mentor in ALfheim Online. He is skilled in concealment and high level dark magic.  He harbors a crush on Suguha, being her classmate in real life. He is key in investigating the Salamander's infiltration of the Sylph, and uncovering Sigurd's plot. He later rejoins Kirito and Lyfa at Aarun, and urges Lyfa to leave and return to Sylvain, after he finds her upset. Later he confesses to her and ends up getting punched. After Lyfa returns from meeting Kirito again, she informs them they are attacking the World Tree.   ~!During the World Tree assault, Recon breaks off and attracts multiple guardians, and later uses high level dark magic called Sacrifice to self-destruct, which entails a higher death penalty. This action buys enough time for Sylph and Cait Sith reinforcements to arrive.!~ (Source: SAO Wiki)

Grimlock is a player in Sword Art Online and a former member of the guild Golden Apple.    ~!He was the culprit of his in-game and real-life wife, Griselda's death. He killed her because he didn't like the changes in her personality. At first he didn't want to aid Caynz and Yolko in their plans to catch Griselda's killer by forging them weapons to use in the in-AREA murders. Evenutally he did, but not with good intentions. He helped so he could have Caynz, Yolko and Scmitt together and get them killed with the help of the Laughing Coffin. But the plan failed, because Kirito came to the rescue. He is caught by Asuna. It is unknown to what happened to him in the remaining time of SAO, but in the end, he was logged out.!~ (Source: Sword Art Online Wikia)

Sigurd is a Sylph warrior in the VRMMORPG «ALfheim Online». He lost to Lyfa in the Sylph tournament yet he still retained high ambitions to hold power among the Sylph. He later tries to betray the Sylph to the Salamander. He is later caught and exiled by Sakuya, after the botched assassination attempt.   (Source: Wikipedia)

He is the leader of the guild Black Cats of the Full Moon he and the other members (not including Kirito) are actually computer research club members from the same high school in the real world.   ~!One day, Keita went to buy a little house as their guild home and after he got back Kirito told him all the other members died after they got attacked by monsters. Keita then ran out of the town in Aincrad, and jumped over a fence without hesitation committing suicide by jumping in the endless void.!~

She is a middle level dagger user. She is a very cheerful and sweet girl. She has a very rare familiar, a feathery dragon that she named Pina after her cat in the real world. She treasured Pina a lot and was the reason she survived in the game. Aside from being a female player, she is also a Beast Tamer and thus perceived as an idol amongst the middle level players. She received endless invitations from parties and guilds who wanted an idol player to join them to get more fame. Because of the attention she got, she became overly proud of herself and left a party one time after a misunderstanding. She got surrounded by monsters and lost Pina in the end. She was then rescued by Kirito who was passing by and helped her to resurrect the dead familiar.

Argo "The Rat" serves as an information broker and courier in the Sword Art Online death game. Kirito and Argo suspect each-other without doubt to be a fellow beta testers but refuses to ever confirm the topic. As a broker she is known to sell any information for any price, including the story of her mysterious trademark whiskers. While she sells information to some at occasionally hefty prices, she is also known the be the author of free guide books situated in most town shops to help beginners. 

~!Argo's whiskers were originally drawn on to learn the "Martial Arts" skill during the beta test. Unable to complete the quest before beta testing ended, they became her trademark and source of her nickname.!~

Lind is one of the 10,000 players initially trapped in Sword Art Online. He sees himself as [Diavel](https://anilist.co/character/65169/Diavel)'s successor and thus founds the Dragon Knights Brigade, one of the two major clearing guilds early in the game alongside [Kibaou](https://anilist.co/character/65171/Kibaou)'s Aincrad Liberation Squad.
